feed.title: Edge Cases Podcast

bullets: Today we're talking about cultural drift, and I'm joined by Jordan Park, cultural critic.
Jordan Park, thanks for being here.
Excited for this one — dialogue and conversational drift is something I've been thinking about a lot.
